title: Umas Luches
description: This mod includes a great experience for Umamusume fans, including cool plushies with a gacha machine, each with sounds and achievements, and a nice decoration for your server or world.
body:
# 🐴 Umas Luches Mod

Bring the charm and energy of **Umamusume: Pretty Derby** straight into your Minecraft world! This mod introduces high-quality, beautifully textured 3D plushies of your favorite horse girls to accompany you on your adventures or decorate your bases.

Whether you are a dedicated fan of the franchise or just want to add some cute, high-quality collectibles to your game, this mod is perfect for you!

---

## ✨ Features

* **Detailed 3D Models:** Custom voxel models designed to capture the unique look, hairstyles, and iconic outfits of the characters.
* **Perfect Decorations:** Place them on tables, shelves or carry them around in your hand!
* **Optimized & Lightweight:** Textures and models are fully optimized to ensure zero performance drops or lag on your technical servers.
* **Some include sounds when you right-click**

## 🏇 Included Characters

* **Special Week**
* **Silence Suzuka**
* **Tokai Teio**
* **Kitasan Black**
* **Rice Shower**
* **Haru Urara**
* ...and more to come in future updates!
---
# Crafting
![UmaCoin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a0db87ecb2c77deea3314d1a63e535ab82bf782.png)

![Gacha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36aae69fc9f8c49e573ff8ae64ebb9808ccad48e.png)



## ⚙️ Requirements & Compatibility

* **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1 and 1.21.1
* **Mod Loader:** Forge and NeoForge
* Works perfectly on multiplayer servers and roleplay environments!

---

*Disclaimer: This is a fan-made project dedicated to the Umamusume: Pretty Derby franchise. All character rights belong to Cygames.*
